title: BoRa Android Virus Cleaner V1.3
changelog: 🔴 Virus detected lines now show in BOLD RED — impossible to miss
✅ Removed virus lines show in GREEN for clear confirmation
🔧 pct_var NameError crash fully fixed — progress % updates correctly
⚡ REMOVE ALL timeout reduced 20s → 8s per app (much faster)
📟 Status bar shows current app name during REMOVE ALL
🎯 All 3 scan phases (VIRUS_DB + Services + Keywords) use correct colors
🔴 Phase 2 suspicious service hits also show RED + GREEN on remove
🔴 Phase 3 keyword hits also show RED + GREEN on remove
🏷️ Failed-to-remove lines show RED so you know what needs manual action
notes: Update includes critical crash fix and full virus color system overhaul.
